tasks.instruction: Dopasuj imiona i nazwiska wynalazców (1–6) do opisów ich wynalazków (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: He invented the telephone in 1876, making it possible for people to speak to each other over long distances.
He created the first practical light bulb in 1879 and also developed the phonograph for recording sound.
This engineer built the first successful petrol-powered motor car and founded one of the world's first automobile companies.
He invented the World Wide Web in 1989, a system that allows people to share information over the internet.
This Polish-born scientist invented a method of using X-rays to take pictures inside the human body.
He invented the printing press with movable type in Europe around 1440, revolutionising the spread of books.
She invented Kevlar, an extremely strong material used in bulletproof vests and protective equipment.
He developed the first working steam engine that was efficient enough to power factories and locomotives.
